title: Errors 5
description: Custom error types can implement the `std::fmt::Display` and `std::error::Error` traits for better error reporting.
instructions: Implement the From trait to enable automatic error conversion with the ? operator.
hints: The `?` operator uses `From` to convert between error types automatically.
In the from method, wrap the error: AppError::ParseError(e)
explanation: When you use the `?` operator, Rust calls `From::from()` to convert the error type. By implementing `From<ParseIntError> for AppError`, the `?` operator can automatically convert ParseIntError into AppError. This pattern allows composing functions with different error types cleanly.
